title: David McMorris
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: David McMorris
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_college: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

organizational_affiliations.label: College of Natural and Behavioral Sciences

biography: David McMorris earned his PhD and MS in mathematics from the University of Nebraska-Lincoln, as well as a BS in mathematics from Hope College. Dr. McMorris began teaching at Christopher Newport University in 2021 as an adjunct, and as of 2025 is a lecturer. Outside of math, he enjoys running, birdwatching, cooking, and reading.
education_entries: Ph D in Mathematics, University of Nebraska-Lincoln
MS in Mathematics, University of Nebraska-Lincoln
research_interests: Mathematical Biology Optimal Control Theory Scientific Computing
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2025). Optimal allocation of two resources in annual plants. . Mathematical biosciences and engineering : MBE. Volume, 22. Issue, 6. Pages, 1464-1516.
